# Edward

> Self-hosted AI assistant with long-term memory, extensible skills, and proactive monitoring. Built with Next.js, FastAPI, LangGraph, and PostgreSQL.

Edward (Enhanced Digital Workflow Assistant for Routine Decisions) is an open-source, self-hosted AI assistant that remembers every conversation, evolves its own code, and proactively monitors your messages and calendar. Your data never leaves your machine.

## Documentation

- [Introduction](https://meet-edward.com/docs/introduction): Overview of Edward — what it is, key features, and how it works
- [Beginner Guide](https://meet-edward.com/docs/beginner-guide): Step-by-step setup for non-technical users
- [Setup with AI](https://meet-edward.com/docs/setup-with-ai): Install Edward using Claude Code, Cursor, or Windsurf
- [Getting Started](https://meet-edward.com/docs/getting-started): Quick start for developers with prerequisites and troubleshooting
- [Configuration](https://meet-edward.com/docs/configuration): Complete environment variable reference
- [Platform Support](https://meet-edward.com/docs/platform-support): Cross-platform compatibility — macOS, Linux, Windows (WSL)
- [Architecture](https://meet-edward.com/docs/architecture): System design — LangGraph pipeline, database, background services
- [Skills & Integrations](https://meet-edward.com/docs/skills): Modular skills — messaging, code execution, search, Apple Services
- [Memory System](https://meet-edward.com/docs/memory): Hybrid vector + BM25 retrieval, extraction, reflection, consolidation
- [Heartbeat](https://meet-edward.com/docs/heartbeat): Proactive monitoring — iMessage, Calendar, Email triage
- [Widget](https://meet-edward.com/docs/widget): iOS home screen widget via Scriptable
- [File Storage](https://meet-edward.com/docs/file-storage): Persistent file storage with categories and tags
- [Orchestrator & Claude Code](https://meet-edward.com/docs/orchestrator): Parallel worker agents and Claude Code sessions

## Key Features

- **Long-term memory**: Hybrid 70% vector + 30% BM25 retrieval with pgvector, automatic extraction via Claude Haiku
- **Self-hosted**: Runs entirely on your machine — PostgreSQL, FastAPI, Next.js. No cloud dependency.
- **Extensible skills**: Messaging (iMessage, Twilio SMS/WhatsApp, WhatsApp MCP), code execution (Python, JS, SQL, Shell), web search, Apple Services, HTML hosting
- **Proactive heartbeat**: Monitors iMessage, Calendar, and Email — classifies and responds automatically
- **Scheduled events**: Self-triggering reminders, messages, and tasks with cron support
- **Worker agents**: Orchestrator spawns mini-Edwards with full tool access for parallel tasks
- **Self-evolution**: Claude Code integration for autonomous code changes with validation
- **Custom MCP servers**: Discover, install, and use MCP servers at runtime
- **iOS widget**: Home screen widget via Scriptable with structured data or raw JavaScript
- **Document store**: Persistent document storage with semantic search
- **File storage**: Categorized file management with sandbox-to-storage flow
- **Push notifications**: Web Push via VAPID for alerts and reminders

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: Next.js 14, React, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: FastAPI, Python 3.11+, LangGraph
- Database: PostgreSQL with pgvector, langgraph-checkpoint-postgres
- LLM: Claude (Anthropic API) via ChatAnthropic
- Embedding: sentence-transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2, 384 dims)
